insulation.name: Insulation / Lagging
strengths: Pipe insulation materials well documented (mineral wool, phenolic, elastomeric)
BS 5422 thickness specifications referenced
Duct insulation internal and external methods covered
Fire-rated insulation types included
gaps: Limited equipment insulation types (no pumps, flanges)

mechanical.name: Mechanical / Pipework
strengths: 8 pipe materials with full specifications and standards
40+ valve types with drawing symbols and manufacturer refs
BS 1710 colour coding, DN/NB cross-reference tables
Waste factors integrated per material type

electrical.name: Electrical
strengths: Cable types well defined (SWA, LSZH, FP200, MICC)
Containment systems comprehensive (tray, trunking, conduit)
Distribution board specifications with form of separation
BS 5839 fire alarm system coverage
gaps: Sound system and PA specifications absent

ductwork.name: Ductwork / HVAC
strengths: Rectangular ductwork construction detailed (DW/144)
Pressure classes and airtightness covered
Joint types and gauge tables provided
gaps: Circular and flat-oval ductwork not fully covered
Acoustic design and silencer specs missing

plumbing.name: Plumbing & Heating
strengths: Water supply pipework covered via M01
L8 Legionella compliance referenced in standards
gaps: Soil and waste design rules missing

fire.name: Fire Protection
strengths: Intumescent collar types documented
Fire alarm system architecture understood
gaps: NO dedicated fire protection KB section

hvac.name: HVAC
strengths: Ductwork construction well covered
Plant equipment types listed
CIBSE Guide B referenced

multi.name: Multi-trade M&E
strengths: Broad coverage across mechanical, electrical, and insulation
Core standards and extraction rules apply to all trades
Conflict resolution and hallucination prevention built in
gaps: Plumbing and fire protection coverage weak
Token budget may dilute trade-specific detail
